title: Add public docs site and repository standards
summary: EVE now has a Fumadocs documentation website plus GitHub repository metadata for licensing, contribution guidance, CI, dependency checks, and tagged releases.
userVisibleChange: Visitors can read a deployable Next.js/Fumadocs documentation site, and the GitHub repository now includes license, contribution, security, changelog, CI, Dependabot, and release workflow files.

risks.title: GitHub release workflows use current major actions and still need to run on GitHub after the first pushed tag.

decisions.title: Use Fumadocs on Next.js so the documentation remains MDX-based, searchable, agent-readable, and deployable on Vercel.
Keep the public docs site in site/ so it stays separate from the embedded local UI served by eve dev.
